title: SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C Cheat Sheet
printNote: Quick reference for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C in SQL & Databases.

entries.syntax: -- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C
entries.example:
-- SQL Database query for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C
SELECT id, title, category, created_at
FROM application_records
WHERE category = 'SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C' AND is_active = 1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
entries.description: Basic syntax for SQL & Databases Troubleshooting Part 9C
